arts.ttl: Napoli-Udinese will be the final game on Sunday
arts.sum: Napoli have won each of their last 10 Serie A home games against Udinese, scoring an average of 3.1 goals per match in the period. Napoli are unbeaten in their last 17 Serie A matches against Udinese (W14 D3); in their top-flight history the Partenopei have only enjoyed a longer such streak against four teams before: Cagliari (18), Cesena (26), Como (18) and Roma (19).

arts.ttl: Runjaic: ‘Udinese Aiming for Points Against League Leaders Napoli’
arts.sum: Udinese coach Kosta Runjaic expressed determination and cautious optimism ahead of his team's challenging away fixture against Serie A leaders Napoli. Speaking at a pre-match press conference, Runjaic acknowledged the formidable nature of their opponents while emphasizing Udinese's intent to compete.
